lines.english: He Himself is wisdom, contemplation and discerning understanding.
The One Lord is the Creator of all things, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਨੇਰੈ ਸਭ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: door na nerai sabh kai sangaa |
lines.english: He is not far away; He is near at hand, with all.
So praise the True One, O Nanak, with love! ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis kau miliaa jis masatak bhaagaa |
lines.english: It is received only by those who have such good destiny inscribed upon their foreheads.
Serving the Guru, one is committed to the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Their minds and bodies become peaceful and stable. ||1||
The Lord dwells within their hearts.
O my mind, sing such Praises of the Lord,
Meditating on Him, fear and misfortune depart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਹਾ ਊਹਾ ਜੋ ਕਾਮਿ ਤੇਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eehaa aoohaa jo kaam terai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: which shall be of use to you here and hereafter. ||1||Pause||
and the wandering mind is held steady.
Meditating on Him, the five passions are overcome.
Meditating on Him, this ego runs away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaas japat fir dookh na laagai |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, suffering shall never again overtake you.
Meditating on Him, one is approved in the Court of the Lord. ||3||
Meditating on Him, this desire is quenched.
Meditating on Him, Ambrosial Nectar is collected in the heart.
Meditating on Him, the mind is cooled and soothed.
Meditating on Him, one becomes Holy, blessed by the Lord.
Meditating on Him, millions of mistakes are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਿਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: bahur na chhoddai har sang hilai |
lines.english: One is reconciled with the Lord, and shall not abandon Him again.
Meditating on Him, the jewel of the Lord is obtained.
Meditating on Him, all filth is washed away. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਇਹ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਪੋਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: jaas japat ih agan na pohat |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, one is not affected by this fire.
Meditating on Him, many acquire a home in the heavens.
Meditating on Him, one abides in intuitive peace. ||5||
Meditating on Him, your forehead shall be immaculate.
Meditating on Him, all pains are destroyed. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਇਹੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਜੋਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: jaas japat ihu kaal na johat |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, one is not under the gaze of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਮੁਸਕਲੁ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਬਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaas japat musakal kachhoo na banai |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, no difficulties are encountered.
Meditating on Him, one hears the unstruck melody.
Meditating on Him, one acquires this pure reputation.
Meditating on Him, the heart-lotus is turned upright. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦੇ ਹਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai hiradai mantru de haree |
lines.english: within whose hearts the Lord has implanted His Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਸੁਭ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur subh drisatt sabh aoopar karee |
lines.english: The Guru has bestowed His Glance of Grace upon all,
The unbroken Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is their food and nourishment.
Says Nanak, they have the Perfect True Guru. ||8||2||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
cut their connections with the five passions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad rid antar dhaarai |
lines.english: Those who implant the Word of the Guru's Shabad within their hearts
They keep the ten organs under their control;
their souls are enlightened. ||1||
They alone acquire such stability,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦਇਆ ਮਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau deaa meaa prabh soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: whom God blesses with His Mercy and Grace. ||1||Pause||
Whatever they speak is wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨੁ ਦੁਸਟੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: saajan dusatt jaa kai ek samaanai |
lines.english: Friend and foe are one and the same to them.
Whatever they hear is the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
They awaken in peace and poise; they sleep in peace and poise.
That which is meant to be, automatically happens.
Whatever they see is meditation. ||2||
In peace and poise, they remain detached; in peace and poise, they laugh.
In peace and poise they eat; in peace and poise they love.
The illusion of duality is easily and totally removed.
In peace and poise, they remain silent; in peace and poise, they chant. ||3||
In peace and poise, they meet and merge with the Supreme Lord God. ||4||
They are at peace in their homes, and they are at peace while detached.
They naturally join the Saadh Sangat, the Society of the Holy.
